message:
refactor(search): import CassFields and CASS_SCHEMA_HASH directly from frankensearch

Replace indirect references through crate::search::tantivy re-export layer
with direct imports from frankensearch::lexical in query.rs. Four call sites
updated: SearchClient.reader field type, cache_namespace construction,
search_tantivy method parameter, and maybe_spawn_warm_worker parameter. The
local tantivy.rs aliases (SCHEMA_HASH, Fields) are preserved for other callers
but query.rs no longer routes through them, reducing indirection.

Also update .beads/last-touched session marker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
